_readme: Merge this hooks block into your USER-level ~/.claude/settings.json (NOT the workspace .claude/settings.json -- workspace hooks don't fire for sessions opened in project subfolders). Replace /Users/you with your real home path; settings.json does not expand ~ or $HOME. Hooks load at session start, so changes take effect in the NEXT session. The bash receipt deliberately avoids $-variables -- Claude Code's interpolating wrapper eats them silently (see harness_me.txt Section 4). The mechanical guard hook is omitted here: its two breakages are Windows-only; add one only if you have a parsing breakage worth blocking.

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f CHECKPOINT.md ]; then echo "=== CHECKPOINT RECEIPT (resume context for this project) ==="; echo "CHECKPOINT.md present (lines bytes filename):"; wc -l -c CHECKPOINT.md; echo "NOT inlined here. ACTION: Read CHECKPOINT.md to EOF before any non-pre-oriented action. If the Read shows a truncation / partial-view notice, re-Read until complete."; echo "=== end RECEIPT ==="; fi'

bash -c 'if [ -f CHECKPOINT.md ]; then echo "REMINDER: Context is about to be compacted. If CHECKPOINT.md in the current project has not been updated this session, rewrite it now with compressed state before proceeding."; fi'
